title: Migration script skeleton: generic Notion -> Graphiti
userStory: As an operator, I want a NotionMigrator scaffold that ingests any Notion target by id so that I can seed the brain from any database or page without writing domain-specific code.
acceptanceCriteria: New file migrate/notion_to_graphiti.py defines class NotionMigrator with methods: migrate_database(database_id), migrate_page(page_id), and migrate(target_id, kind) that dispatches by kind
kind=auto inspects the Notion object to choose database vs page automatically
Each migrate_* method pages through content, builds an episode (name + body + reference_time + notion_page_id + notion_last_edited), and calls graphiti.add_episode through a shared dispatcher
--dry-run logs the would-be calls without invoking Graphiti
Verify: python migrate/notion_to_graphiti.py --target <known-db-id> --kind database --dry-run prints planned episodes for at least one row
